title: bromus porteri
intro: Bromus porteri, also known as Porter's brome or cheatgrass, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bromus porteri include the potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as coughs and congestion. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
